query: CRT television static screen flicker old TV monitor
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: CRT television static and old TV monitors

response.objective_caption: A close-up, abstract view of what appears to be two white chopsticks or similar tapered utensils resting on or near dark, textured organic forms, possibly food items, alongside a smooth, rounded white bowl or cup partially visible at the right edge, all rendered in a blue-green and white color scheme.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily degraded, low-resolution close-up showing visible CRT-style scanlines and analog signal artifacts across the entire frame, where two white chopsticks or similar tapered utensils rest on dark, textured organic forms beside a smooth white bowl edge, with fine details dissolved into mushy, indistinct patterns and surfaces obscured by the coarse pixelated display texture.
